blocks.text: ♟️ Grenke Chess Festival Round 2, 10:15 — Carlsen in form after latest victory
Barcelona lead Real Madrid by 4 points with a game in hand. A win at the Metropolitano on Saturday all but ends the title race — Atlético, 16 points back, are playing for their Champions League spot.

blocks.label: ☀️ Sunday — Monster Day
items: 🚴 Tour of Flanders 10:00 — Monument classic from Antwerp to Oudenaarde, seven Norwegians on the start line
🎾 Monte-Carlo Masters 06:00 — Clay season opens, Ruud's favourite surface awaits
🏎️ Japanese GP 07:00 — Antonelli 9pts clear of Russell, Suzuka delivers a verdict

blocks.text: 🎮 PGL CS2 Major Bucharest starts Mon 02:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) headlines the biggest CS2 event of 2026
